description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a wide, rectangular footprint and a prominent gable roof covered in brown shingles. The front facade features a garage on the left, a main entry door with double shutters, and several windows with matching shutters, all set in a muted gray exterior. The windows and doors are symmetrically arranged, giving the house a balanced and orderly appearance. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a modest overhang. The garage door is ribbed and metallic, while the main entryway is accentuated by a small covered area. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of modern ranch-style homes found in residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, gray suburban house with a brown gable roof, garage, and symmetrical windows and doors with shutters.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entry door with shutters, and several windows with shutters.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain gable end of the house and the sloped roof, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a row of windows and a central double door, all with shutters, under the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain gable end and the roof slope, similar to view 1.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with double doors and shutters, small covered area, no porch or columns, simple and functional.
